name: The Cash Flow Company
description_short: The Cash Flow Company provides real estate investment loans for fix-and-flip and rental properties, emphasizing human-to-human service and flexible funding solutions for real estate investors.
description_long:
The Cash Flow Company is a real estate-focused lending firm founded on the principle of connecting investors with financing to accelerate their property acquisition and development. The company positions itself within the real estate investment ecosystem, serving as both a direct lender and a connector to additional capital sources when needed. Their core philosophy centers on the two pillars of real estate investing: finding good investment properties and securing the right financing to purchase them. The company is led by Mike Bonn, identified as a real estate funding expert who personally engages with clients and maintains long-term relationships, with Google reviews dating back 14+ years.

The Cash Flow Company offers investor real estate loans designed to fund fix-and-flip and rental property purchases. Their service model includes a quick loan inquiry process, online courses for real estate investing education, a "SOS Property" distressed property solution service, and personal guidance from their cash flow coach. They promote a "Money Buckets" framework—their concept of organizing multiple funding resources to support property acquisition, renovation, and sale. The company also references 0% credit card options as an alternative funding method. Their hybrid lending model means they can source loans from multiple providers if their direct products don't fit the customer's needs.

The Cash Flow Company differentiates itself through explicit human-to-human engagement, rejecting reliance on AI and emphasizing real person-to-person connections. They claim access to an "A List" of best-rate opportunities and position themselves as a resource not just for direct lending but for broader real estate professional networking (working with realtors, bankers, wholesalers). Google reviews consistently praise quick turnaround times (funding "in a matter of days") and professional service. The company also offers educational content through online courses and has developed proprietary frameworks like "Money Buckets" to educate investors.

Based on available information, The Cash Flow Company appears to be a legitimate, established lender with strong customer retention and positive reviews spanning over a decade. However, specific details about loan terms, rates, fees, and eligibility requirements are not published on their website. The company's emphasis on real estate investor networks and educational products suggests they may focus on investors with some experience or sophistication. As with any alternative lender, consumers should request full disclosure of terms, APR ranges, and comparison shop before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 5.0 Google review rating based on 20 reviews with demonstrated long-term customer relationships (14+ years with some clients)
Fast funding turnaround—customers report loans funded "in a matter of days" rather than weeks
Hybrid lending model allows the company to source loans from multiple providers if their direct products don't fit
Direct access to Mike Bonn and team as real people, not automated systems or AI-based lending decisions
Educational resources including online courses and "Money Buckets" framework to help investors structure deals effectively
Dual service model addressing both active investors and distressed property holders through SOS Property service
Network access to real estate professionals (realtors, bankers, wholesalers) for deal support beyond lending
cons: No published loan rates, APR ranges, or fee schedules on the website—customer must inquire directly to understand true cost
Requires active real estate investment focus; unclear if company serves general small business or only real estate investors
Limited transparency on loan approval criteria, credit score minimums, or property type restrictions
Educational products (online courses, Money Buckets book) appear to be upsells that may not be necessary for core lending
No third-party verification of claims beyond Google reviews; no Better Business Bureau, SBA lending history, or regulatory disclosures visible
best_for: Experienced real estate investors with multiple fix-and-flip or rental properties seeking quick capital access
Real estate professionals (wholesalers, realtors, bankers) needing reliable lending relationships for client deals
Investors with distressed or stuck properties needing rapid exit solutions or refinancing
Real estate business owners seeking education and capital simultaneously to scale operations
diagnosis: The Cash Flow Company is best suited for experienced or actively-investing real estate professionals who prioritize quick funding and human relationship management over comparing rates across multiple lenders. The primary caveat is that loan terms, rates, and fees are not transparently disclosed online—interested borrowers must contact directly and will need to request full pricing comparisons to evaluate true cost relative to bank loans or other alternative lenders.
services: Quick loan inquiry and application process
SOS Property distressed property assistance and financing
Cash Flow Coach personal guidance from Mike Bonn
Money Buckets framework consulting and book
0% credit card funding option for business expenses
Hybrid lending (in-house loans and partner network sourcing)
A List rate-locking program for competitive market rates
Real estate professional networking and referrals
Personal loan management and relationship oversight
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
